description_long: This is a medium-sized stone obelisk set on a paved platform, featuring a stepped, multi-tiered base with angular and curved surfaces. The obelisk rises from a broad, polygonal plinth, narrowing in two distinct stages before culminating in a spherical finial at the top. The front face displays a metal plaque, likely for commemorative or informational purposes, while the other sides are plain. Four small, decorative posts are positioned at the corners of the base, connected by a low curb. The surface is a light gray stone, with some weathering and minor discoloration visible, especially near the ground. The surrounding area is paved with rectangular stone tiles, some of which show signs of dirt and wear.
description: A light gray stone obelisk with a stepped base, metal plaque, and spherical finial, set on a paved platform with decorative corner posts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metal plaque, stepped base, and all four decorative posts on the paved platform.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the plain back of the obelisk and the angular structure of the base, with visible dirt patches on the pavement.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the obelisk's tiered narrowing and the clean lines of the base, with more pronounced weathering on the pavement.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both the plaque and the side of the obelisk, as well as the arrangement of the posts and curb.
attribute_inscription: A metal plaque with engraved text is visible on the front face; the text appears to be in Latin script but is not legible in detail from the images.
attribute_ornamentation: None visible beyond the spherical finial and the decorative posts at the base corners.
attribute_base_design: The base is a multi-stepped, polygonal structure with both angular and curved surfaces, featuring four small decorative posts at the corners connected by a low curb. The base is constructed from the same light gray stone as the obelisk.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is capped with a smooth, spherical stone finial, unadorned and matching the obelisk's material.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is surrounded by a paved platform of rectangular stone tiles, with some dirt and discoloration visible near the base. No other notable features are present.
